title: Density Of Being
definition: The emphasis on the concentration and richness of experiences over their number or duration.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Focusing on having deep, meaningful experiences rather than many shallow ones.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A perspective that values the quality and intensity of experiences over their quantity or length.
difficulty_levels.expert: The philosophical concept that values the concentration and richness of experiences over their number or duration, challenging traditional notions of a meaningful life based on longevity.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that having fewer but denser experiences can lead to a more fulfilling life.
